evals.prompt: Write a CommandFactory method called GetPlanogramsByStore that takes a string storeNumber parameter and returns a DataTable. It should call the stored procedure cx_planograms_by_store_get.
evals.expected_output: Method with _logger.Information Starting/Finished logging, try/catch with _logger.Error, DynamicParameters for storeNumber, conn.ExecuteReader using _customSchema.cx_planograms_by_store_get, retVal.Load(reader), ConnectionCleanup(conn) inside using block, and Finished log showing retVal.Rows.Count rows.

assertions.name: has-start-logging
assertions.description: _logger.Information Starting GetPlanogramsByStore() is the first statement in the method body

assertions.name: has-finish-logging-with-rowcount
assertions.description: _logger.Information Finished line includes retVal.Rows.Count rows before the return statement

assertions.name: has-try-catch-logger-error
assertions.description: catch (Exception ex) block calls _logger.Error(ex, GetPlanogramsByStore Exception)

assertions.name: uses-dynamic-parameters
assertions.description: DynamicParameters used and storeNumber is added as a parameter

assertions.name: uses-custom-schema
assertions.description: Stored proc is called via _customSchema prefix — schema is NOT hardcoded

assertions.name: calls-connection-cleanup
assertions.description: ConnectionCleanup(conn) is called inside the using block before it closes

evals.expected_output: Flags all five issues: async/await not used in this codebase, new SqlConnection() should be GetDbConnection(), missing Start/Finish _logger.Information logging, missing try/catch with _logger.Error, and conn.Close() should be ConnectionCleanup(conn).

assertions.name: flags-async-await
assertions.description: Identifies async/await as not used in this codebase's pattern

assertions.name: flags-direct-sqlconnection
assertions.description: Flags new SqlConnection and tells the user to use GetDbConnection() instead

assertions.name: flags-missing-start-finish-logging
assertions.description: Flags the absence of _logger.Information Starting/Finished logging

assertions.name: flags-missing-try-catch
assertions.description: Flags the absence of a try/catch block with _logger.Error

assertions.name: flags-missing-connection-cleanup
assertions.description: Flags that conn.Close() should be replaced with ConnectionCleanup(conn)

evals.prompt: Add a new model class called PlanogramSummary with these fields: PlanogramKey (int), Name (string), StoreNumber (string), Width (double), Height (double), EffectiveDate (double).
evals.expected_output: internal class PlanogramSummary in a Models namespace with only auto-properties (public Type Name { get; set; }), no constructor body, no methods.

assertions.name: uses-internal-class
assertions.description: Class is declared with internal visibility

assertions.name: uses-auto-properties
assertions.description: All fields are auto-properties with get; set; — no backing fields, no constructor assignments

assertions.name: no-constructor-body
assertions.description: No custom constructor with initialization logic
